title: Mali Rebels Strike Major Blow Against Junta and Russia’s Africa Corps
summary_full: Coordinated attacks signified a major escalation of insurgent violence in a region of West Africa where military leaders had seized power and warmed to Moscow in recent years.
summary_public: Coordinated attacks signified a major escalation of insurgent violence in a region of West Africa where military leaders had seized power and warmed to Moscow in recent years.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Mali Rebels Strike Major Blow Against Junta and Russia’s Africa Corps
